channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Hotter Nights Stealing Sleep Across World, India Among Hardest Hit

media:content.media:description: The impact is most visible in hot parts of the world.

item.description: Cities across the Middle East recorded the highest heat-related sleep losses, while parts of South Asia, Southeast Asia and West Africa also showed significant impacts.
item.content:encoded: Cities across the Middle East recorded the highest heat-related sleep losses, while parts of South Asia, Southeast Asia and West Africa also showed significant impacts.

item.title: Bangladesh Protesters Seek Death For Kolkata MLA Over Airport Mosque Row

media:content.media:description: The row intensified after authorities suspended namaz at the Bankra Mosque for three days

item.description: A protest rally was organised in Bangladesh by local residents and several Muslim organisations following reports of restrictions on Friday prayers at the Bankra Mosque, also known as the Gouripur Jama Masjid, located within the Kolkata Airport premises.
item.content:encoded: A protest rally was organised in Bangladesh by local residents and several Muslim organisations following reports of restrictions on Friday prayers at the Bankra Mosque, also known as the Gouripur Jama Masjid, located within the Kolkata Airport premises.

item.title: Andy Burnham To Take Oath As Britain's Prime Minister Next Week

media:content.media:description: Burnham will arrive in Downing Street largely unknown to voters outside Manchester.

item.description: Burnham brings a more relaxed style of leadership than the rather stern Starmer, and is regarded as one of the Labour Party's best communicators.
item.content:encoded: Burnham brings a more relaxed style of leadership than the rather stern Starmer, and is regarded as one of the Labour Party's best communicators.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Pakistan's Iran Problem Isn't Going Anywhere
item.description: Despite its glowing successes, and for all its mediation efforts, Pakistan's toughest audience may be in Iran itself
item.content:encoded: Despite its glowing successes, and for all its mediation efforts, Pakistan's toughest audience may be in Iran itself

item.title: "Progressing Well": Mumbai-Ahmedabad Bullet Train On Track For 2027 Launch

media:content.media:description: Both countries have agreed to kick-start operations using an Indian-made high-speed train

item.description: Government sources said Japan is expected to supply its next-generation E10 Shinkansen trains for the route in the early 2030s. The futuristic train is still being developed, and construction work has rapidly progressed.
item.content:encoded: Government sources said Japan is expected to supply its next-generation E10 Shinkansen trains for the route in the early 2030s. The futuristic train is still being developed, and construction work has rapidly progressed.

item.title: Iran Claims It Destroyed Many US Jets, Caused "Serious Damage" To Many More

media:content.media:description: Iran Guards Claimed to use ballistic missiles and drones.

item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they destroyed "several US refuelling aircraft and fighter jets" and caused "serious damage to many more".
item.content:encoded: Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they destroyed "several US refuelling aircraft and fighter jets" and caused "serious damage to many more".

item.title: US Immigration Officer In Maine Shooting Has History Of Violent Behaviour: Report

media:content.media:description: ICE officer accused of violent past shot and killed a Colombian man in Maine

item.description: David Brouillette's relatives accuse him of attacking women in his life over the years, and one shared a voicemail from last winter in which he told her that he thought someone should slit her throat.
item.content:encoded: David Brouillette's relatives accuse him of attacking women in his life over the years, and one shared a voicemail from last winter in which he told her that he thought someone should slit her throat.

item.title: 3 Things To Know About Trump's Election Fraud Allegations Against China

media:content.media:description: Trump relied on CIA documents about purported election-rigging

item.description: Trump has made the claim that the 2020 elections were "rigged" more than 100 times over the first half of 2026, and has used those claims to push for Congress to pass a restrictive voter ID law called the SAVE America Act
item.content:encoded: Trump has made the claim that the 2020 elections were "rigged" more than 100 times over the first half of 2026, and has used those claims to push for Congress to pass a restrictive voter ID law called the SAVE America Act

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: Iran Says Struck US Aircraft In Jordan With Missiles, Drones

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War News LIVE: The US-Iran tensions have escalated in recent days

item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Iran claimed it destroyed "several US refuelling aircraft and fighter jets" and caused "serious damage to many more".
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: Iran claimed it destroyed "several US refuelling aircraft and fighter jets" and caused "serious damage to many more".

item.title: "Keeping Them Is Theft": Australian Minister Says Will Return Stolen Indian Artefacts

media:content.media:description: Australia had said it would return artworks to India

item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese recently announced the return of several significant Indian artefacts.
item.content:encoded: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese recently announced the return of several significant Indian artefacts.

item.title: Chinese Embassy In Bangladesh Warns Citizens Buying Brides Risk Death Penalty
item.description: Chinese embassy highlights that human trafficking convictions in Bangladesh can lead to long prison terms, fines, or even death penalty.
item.content:encoded: Chinese embassy highlights that human trafficking convictions in Bangladesh can lead to long prison terms, fines, or even death penalty.

item.title: 'F-35 Criticism, Bogus Kill Plot Intel': Why Trump Is 'Pissed' At Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: White House officials said that Israeli PM wanted to meet Trump, but meeting was not confirmed

item.description: The back-and-forth over the potential meeting came days after the Israeli leader went on Fox News before Trump's trip to Ankara and criticised the US leader's intention to sell F-35 fighter jets to Turkey.
item.content:encoded: The back-and-forth over the potential meeting came days after the Israeli leader went on Fox News before Trump's trip to Ankara and criticised the US leader's intention to sell F-35 fighter jets to Turkey.

item.title: 'AI Supercharging Terror Groups, Targeting Children': Australian Minister To NDTV

media:content.media:description: Burke's remarks mark one of the clearest acknowledgements that the India-Australia ties are shifting

item.description: Tony Burke said the traditional architecture of terrorism- organised cells, clear ideological lines, identifiable networks- is being upended.
item.content:encoded: Tony Burke said the traditional architecture of terrorism- organised cells, clear ideological lines, identifiable networks- is being upended.

item.title: Gen Z Is Pushing Back Against AI: A Reminder That Future Isn't Written

media:content.media:description: Gen Z graduates boo AI praise at ceremonies, exposing a deep generational tech rift

item.description: Viral footage of grads booing AI-boosting speakers reveals a deepening generational rift, as Gen Z pushes back against tech elders' optimism
item.content:encoded: Viral footage of grads booing AI-boosting speakers reveals a deepening generational rift, as Gen Z pushes back against tech elders' optimism

item.title: SpaceX Short Sellers Make $4 Billion: Why Investors Are Betting Against Elon Musk

media:content.media:description: SpaceX has a vibrant secondary market where early investors sell their holdings to eligible buyers.

item.description: Despite the recent pressure on its market valuation, analysts believe SpaceX remains the global leader in commercial space launches.
item.content:encoded: Despite the recent pressure on its market valuation, analysts believe SpaceX remains the global leader in commercial space launches.

item.title: At Least 14 Dead As Minibus Falls Into Ravine In Peru

media:content.media:description: Firefighters work to recover victims after a minibus plunged into a ravine in Peru

item.description: A minibus carrying 19 passengers plunged into a ravine near San Juan, Peru, killing 14 and injuring five, with six bodies still unrecovered
item.content:encoded: A minibus carrying 19 passengers plunged into a ravine near San Juan, Peru, killing 14 and injuring five, with six bodies still unrecovered

item.title: China's Xi Says AI Should Not Be Dominated By One Nation

media:content.media:description: China's President Speaks at World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai

item.description: AI has become a strategic pillar of China's industrial policy, driven by state investment aimed at building a domestic ecosystem, from chip production to consumer use.
item.content:encoded: AI has become a strategic pillar of China's industrial policy, driven by state investment aimed at building a domestic ecosystem, from chip production to consumer use.

item.title: Andy Burnham: 'King Of The North' To Become Next UK PM

media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham was to be appointed leader of the ruling Labour party on Friday

item.description: Andy Burnham's elevation to the top job follows a successful nine-year stint as Greater Manchester mayor, during which Burnham transformed himself from former government minister to a political outsider.
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham's elevation to the top job follows a successful nine-year stint as Greater Manchester mayor, during which Burnham transformed himself from former government minister to a political outsider.

item.title: Hundreds vs Zero: Stealth Divide That Could Define Next India-China Conflict

media:content.media:description: China's J-20 Mighty Dragon fifth-generation fighter jet (File)

item.description: If war were to break out between India and China tomorrow, one side could send hundreds of stealth fighter jets into battle, while the other may not be able to send even one.
item.content:encoded: If war were to break out between India and China tomorrow, one side could send hundreds of stealth fighter jets into battle, while the other may not be able to send even one.

item.title: Trump-Backed Gaza Recovery Plan Now Just A Pilot Project: Report

media:content.media:description: The proposal includes a temporary camp.

item.description: The revised plan now focuses on setting up a temporary settlement for a small number of displaced Palestinians, instead of undertaking a territory-wide reconstruction effort.
item.content:encoded: The revised plan now focuses on setting up a temporary settlement for a small number of displaced Palestinians, instead of undertaking a territory-wide reconstruction effort.
